title: A Unified Approach to Interpreting Model Predictions (SHAP)

anchors.evidence: Tree SHAP, Kernel SHAP 等在 ML 平台广泛部署

abstract_nl: We propose SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations), a unified framework for interpreting predictions. The novel components: (1) identification of a new class of additive feature importance measures, (2) theoretical results showing unique solution in this class with desirable properties.
key_contributions: v(S) = E[f̂(X)|X_S] 的 characteristic function 形式化
3 axiom: Local Accuracy, Missingness, Consistency → Shapley 唯一
6 方法统一: LIME, DeepLIFT, LRP, QII, Shapley sampling, Classic Shapley

key_quotes.verbatim: SHAP values as a unified measure of feature importance that various methods approximate

process_meta.[AH-HA]: L17 的 'uniqueness' 是循环论证 —— 'additive' 已经预设了 'SHAP-like', 然后说 'SHAP 唯一'
process_meta.[INFER]: v(S) 绑预测器 f̂ 不绑真结构 f, 是 SC 反命题的入口
